action: Assign one unique avatar to each of the 5 genres: Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Weather.
fallback_action: If assigning unique avatars to the specified genres fails in the future, consider the following measures: 1. Verify availability of enough avatars to avoid duplication, 2. Double-check mapping logic, 3. Retrieve and manually validate saved avatar data for discrepancies.

recipe.steps: Fetch the previously saved teacher avatars from memory.
Assign one unique avatar to each of the 5 genres: Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Weather.
Save the assigned avatar to genre mapping in memory.
Confirm the completion of this action.
